LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastionResearch.label: segmented bastion
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastionResearch.description: Teach the colony brain to fuse allied spine fleshbeasts into a draftable bastion that can split into its original segment swarm.
LanguageData.FB_SegmentedBastionResearch.generalRules: subject_story->bound spine fleshbeasts into a closed segment swarm
subject_story->taught bastion segments to remember their original body
